calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-04-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Comm: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Arlene C. Helfrich, Esq. appeared for Glass Properties, L.P.
Roberta Kimmel, Partner/Manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Paul Helsom.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on December 21, 2009.

Exhibit--1--Employment Contract-------------------------------------------------------ID/EVID
Exhibit--2--Termination Letter--------------------------------------------------------ID/EVID
Exhibit--3--Uniform Statuory Form Power of Attorney
as to Roberta Kimmel, dated December 31, 2009-----------------------------ID/EVID

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Glass Properties, L.P., and against defendant Paul Helsom as follows:

Holdover Damages - $2,924.23.
Attorney Fees - $1,500.00.
Costs - $392.00.
Total - $4,816.23.

Additionally, plaintiff Glass Properties, L.P. is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 1895 Jackson Street, Apartment 404, San Francisco, CA 94109. The lease is forfeited.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-04-2010 Assigned To Trial Court
